event: Parisian Street Scene near Notre-Dame Cathedral
symbols: Notre-Dame cathedral silhouette — the enduring presence of the Church in the heart of secular life
golden evening light — the warmth of grace illuminating the ordinary world
bare autumn trees — the passage of time and the transience of earthly things before the permanence of sacred architecture
pedestrians moving past the cathedral — humanity going about daily life in the shadow of the sacred
description: A Parisian street scene at dusk or early evening, painted in warm golden and amber tones. Notre-Dame Cathedral rises in the right background, its Gothic flying buttresses and tall spire silhouetted against a glowing sky. Bare autumn trees line the quay. Pedestrians in early twentieth-century dress walk along wet, reflective streets. A tram or bus is visible at the left. Street lamps cast warm pools of light. The entire scene is suffused with a golden atmospheric haze.
